---
title: "SpaceX CFO Bret Johnsen Quietly Engineered its Historic IPO and Became an Overnight Billionaire"
date: "June 16, 2026"
jupyter: python3
description: "A Billionaire Accountant"
---

[A Billionaire Accountant](https://fortune.com/2026/06/13/spacex-cfo-bret-johnsen-overnight-billionaire-ipo/).
